The pitiful substitute for obeying these supernatural revelations (Exod. 12, 20) is ]{.class_s321}["Kapporas Schloogen," ]{.class_s322}[where the modern Jew sacrifices a rooster (exactly []{#cA5.xhtml_page_49}as Socrates!) and says, "This hen is my ransom, this is my exchange. This goes to death, but I go into eternal happiness and life." No orthodox Jew reading this page can obey the laws of his own God that his own God gave him, for when he rejected God's Messiah, he was displaced from the divinely appointed place for worship (2 Sam. 24) where God told him to offer his sacrifices (Deut. 12:11). The feeble rebuttal to this is that "in times of declension God allowed it to be offered in other places" (1 Kings 17--18, for example) or that "Abraham offered offerings (Gen. 12, 22) at several places." But Abraham was ]{.class_s321}[not under the law ]{.class_s322}[and Elijah was sent to restore ]{.class_s321}[proper worship ]{.class_s322}[(1 Kings 18:32), not to alibi ]{.class_s321}[improper worship. ]{.class_s322}[God certainly put His people on the spot when He sent them His Son (John 1:29)! By tearing the veil from their Holy of Holies, He let them know exactly how He felt about "sacrifices and burnt offerings" (Heb. 10:5--12). ]{.class_s321}["THERE REMAINETH THEREFORE NO MORE SACRIFICE FOR SINS" ]{.class_s323}[(Heb. 10:10--12).]{.class_s321}

[4. AN IMAGE. Observe how God has not only included things the Jews should have, but also things they ]{.class_s321}[shouldn't have ]{.class_s322}[in His list of what they will "do without." They had no business with ]{.class_s321}[images ]{.class_s322}[to start with, but they had them. They had no business with the ]{.class_s321}[Teraphim, ]{.class_s322}[but they had them (1 Sam. 19:13). So, they will not only do without their king, prince, and sacrifice, which are God ordained, but they will do without their Satanic appendages (see Acts 7:43 and comments) which they invented. 5\. EPHOD. This was found on the upper body of the high priest (see Exod. 35:27 and comments). It included the breastplate with the Urim and Thummin (see Exod. 28:30 and comments), which is apparent from David's use of the Ephod in 1 Samuel 30:7. There is no way for Israel to "enquire" of the Lord concerning ANYTHING unless they accept the God appointed (Heb. 1:9) king and receive the Holy Spirit who can "guide and lead them into all truth" and "show them things to come" (John 16:13).

6\. TERAPHIM. The word refers to household images, which sometimes []{#cA5.xhtml_page_50}were large enough to pass off for a human body (1 Sam. 19:13).

[7. Anyone who does much Bible study knows that seven items are the normal list (see Eph. 6:18 and comments in that Commentary). Then "Israel" is not "the English speaking people" or "the British people" (Garner Ted Armstrong, et al.), for the British people have NOT been "without a king many days," nor have they been "without a prince for many days," and, furthermore, they ARE "numbered among the nations" whereas Israel is NOT (Num. 23:9). Further comparisons only disclose the yawning chasm between Bible believing Christianity and British Israelite scrabble.

[J. Mauchline has put a marginal note on verse 3 so that it will reinforce the private interpretation of Durnmelow, Hinley, et al. CHAPTER FOUR

4:1 Hear the word of the LORD, ye children of Israel: for the LORD hath a controversy with the inhabitants of the land, because there is no truth, nor mercy, nor knowledge of God in the land.

2 By swearing, and lying, and killing, and stealing, and committing adultery, they break out, and blood toucheth blood.

3 Therefore shall the land mourn, and every one that dwelleth therein shall languish, with the beasts of the field, and with the fowls of heaven; yea, the fishes of the sea also shall be taken away.

4 Yet let no man strive, nor reprove another: for thy people are as they that strive with the priest.

5 Therefore shalt thou fall in the day, and the prophet also shall fall with thee in the night, and I will destroy thy mother.

[The opening words of the chapter tell us what the next ten chapters are going to be about. Hosea is ready to minister to Israel, and here he launches on his negative ministry that, apart from one or two "breathing spaces," is one unremitting critical, divisive, controversial blast against the nation of Israel. The three point outline of this sermon, running ten chapters, is: ]{.class_s321}["no TRUTH, nor MERCY, nor KNOWLEDGE OF GOD in the land ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 1). Such a message would be as welcome today in the average church as a rabid hyena. Since Hosea believes in the power of negative blasting, he roots, stumps, dynamites and detonates until there isn't a blade of green grass within fifty miles. There is about as much similarity between Hosea's preaching and the preaching of the modern liberal "prophet" as there is between the soldiery of Nathan Bedford Forrest and Liberace. Whatever may be said of Hosea's "broken heart" and "compassionate burden" (see any commentary by any member of the []{#cB9.xhtml_page_53}"Cult"), when it comes to "telling'em off," he sits right down at the table beside Jeremiah, Paul, Stephen, Micaiah, and the Lord Jesus Christ; he calls the spade a spade.]{.class_s321}

"[Swearing\...lying\...killing\...stealing\... adultery" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 2). No mincing of words with Hosea. None of this "depersonalized in depth study of the meaningful relationships between community involvement and the definitive content of institutionalized structures with the ultimate validation of the dynamic whole." No, there's none of that double chocolate, whipped cream coated banana split when the prophets mount the pulpit to preach. It always comes over the plate waist high: swearing, lying, killing, stealing, adultery. None of this "ultimate validation of the simplistic mentality with a renewed emphasis on the significant thrust No, when you run into a Bible prophet, the 1611 ]{.class_s321}[AV ]{.class_s322}[presents his message so clearly that no educated hypocrite can stand the "archaic" language long enough to get to a bartender.]{.class_s321}

"[Hear the word of the Lord, ye children of Israel" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 1). There is no way to duck the passage. The audience is names. ]{.class_s321}["For the Lord hath a controversy with the inhabitants of the land" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 1), and when the Lord has a controversy, he does not raise up kings, priests, pastors, bishops, popes, evangelists, cardinals, or governors to represent Him in court; He raises up a ]{.class_s321}[prophet ]{.class_s322}[(12:10, 12--13). What if one of these bronzed, bearded, hell fire anddamnation preachers suddenly stepped onto the floor of the Senate and hollered, "Hear the word of the Lord you Americans! For the Lord hath a controversy with the United States!" Boy, don't you now they would ship him off to the funny farm in less than a week!]{.class_s321}

"[They break out, and blood toucheth blood"]{.class_s323}[ (vs.]{.class_s321}[ ]{.class_s323}[2). The inhabitants break "out of bounds" (Deut. 32:8 and Acts 17:26) and blood touches blood in intercourse (Lev. 20:10), blood touches blood as innocent victims are murdered (Num. 35:33), and blood touches blood where fights occur over swindles, embezzlements, and frauds (2 Sam. 14:6--7).]{.class_s321}

"[Therefore shall the LAND mourn" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 3). Observe the close connection between a country's agricultural prosperity and her moral condition []{#cB9.xhtml_page_54}(2 Chron. 7:14; Amos 4:7--8; Joel 1:16--20). No nation can live like America lives and pay only 25 cents for a loaf of bread. No nation can live like America lives (and has lived since World War I) and get a pound of ground beef for 98 cents. Our text states that not only will the beasts and the fowl "languish" but seafood will be so scarce you will be paying as much per pound for perch as you pay for sirloin steak. You can call it "pollution" till you are blue in the face and black in the mouth, but MORAL pollution is what pollutes a city, a country, a nation, or an individual; and if you can't clean the airwaves of Mick Jagger, sex perverts, the Rolling Stones, and x-rated TV shows (called "R" and "PG"), then don't waste anybody's time preaching to them about "litterbugs" and burning trash outdoors. You're gazing at more trash on your TV set between 8 and 11 at night than they burn at your city dump in five years.]{.class_s321}

"[Yet let no man strive, nor reprove another: for thy people are as they that strive with the priest" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 4). Ewald, Rashi, and Aben Ezra miss the import of the passage completely---since they were all accomplished Hebrew exegetes who despised the ]{.class_s321}[King James]{.class_s322}[ text---and give us a song and dance about "passing the blame" (Hitzig's private interpretation found in ]{.class_s321}[The "Living" Bible]{.class_s322}[---100 years out of date) and "people reproving priests and needed reproving." But the fact of the matter is that the priest of verse 9 is ]{.class_s321}[not ]{.class_s322}[the priest of verse 4. Striving ]{.class_s321}["with the priest" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 4) shows that the nation, corporately, is violating the law given in Deuteronomy 17:12. The ]{.class_s321}[whole nation ]{.class_s322}[merits capital punishment for its attitude: ]{.class_s321}["and thou shalt put away the evil from Israel" ]{.class_s323}[(Deut. 17:12). No man who honored the Godhonored paragraph marks in the ]{.class_s321}[AV]{.class_s322}[---and what "Fundamentalists" since 1800 did, if he thought he was smarter than God?---would have made the mistake of thinking the ideal priest of verse 4 was the apostate priest of verse 9.]{.class_s321}

"[Therefore shalt thou fall in the day\...in the night, and I will destroy thy mother" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 5). The mother referred to is the nation of Israel that brought forth ]{.class_s321}["the inhabitants of the land" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 1). The verse should be read in conjunction with Jeremiah 6:4 and 15:8. The inhabitants will fall in the ]{.class_s321}[daytime ]{.class_s322}[but the prophets fall at ]{.class_s321}[night, ]{.class_s322}[for their future abode is ]{.class_s321}["outer []{#cB9.xhtml_page_55}darkness" ]{.class_s323}[(Jude 13), as the blind Bar Jesus (Acts 13:11) was blinded and saw "not the sun for a season." God said that the sun would ]{.class_s321}["go down over the prophets and the day shall be dark over them" ]{.class_s323}[(Micah 3:6). ]{.class_s321}[The Pulpit Commentary's ]{.class_s322}[quaint fancy that "a peculiar form of parallelism" explains the verse is just the author's alibi for not understanding the verse.]{.class_s321}

Before listing the perverters and perversions of the passage we will complete our exposition of Hosea 4.

6 My people are destroyed for lack of knowledge: because thou hast rejected knowledge, I will also reject thee, that thou shalt be no priest to me: seeing thou hast forgotten the law of thy God, I will also forget thy children.

7 As they were increased, so they sinned against me: therefore will I change their glory into shame.

8 They eat up the sin of my people, and they set their heart on their iniquity.

9 And there shall be, like people, like priest: and I will punish them for their ways, and reward them their doings.

10 For they shall eat, and not have enough: they shall commit whoredom, and shall not increase: because they have left off to take heed to the LORD.

11 Whoredom and wine and new wine take away the heart.

[The children of Israel were destroyed through ]{.class_s321}["lack of knowledge ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 6), and it was the priest's job to ]{.class_s321}["keep knowledge" ]{.class_s323}[(Mal. 2:7). But the reader should apply the brakes immediately at verse 6, for an increase of knowledge (Dan. 12:4) often means ]{.class_s321}[departure from God ]{.class_s322}[(1 Cor. 1:19, 21); so, ]{.class_s321}["the lack of knowledge"]{.class_s323}[ Hosea is complaining about has nothing to do with the ridiculous nonsense carried on by Pythagoras, Meitner, Priestly, Osiander, Gockel, Grimaldi, Carnot, Davy, Oliva, Aston, Alter, Ampere, []{#cB9.xhtml_page_56}Archimedes, Mencke, Ohm, Ptolemy, Kepler, Lord Kelvin, Gauss, Gesisel, Farraday, Erman, Stahl, Strassman, Germer, Gockely, Hertiz, Hinks Janssen, Metius, Nhere, Schrodinger, Townley, Aratus, Aekinson, Bessel, Minkowski, Einstein, LaPlace, Frisch, Dreyer, Hess and Poincare.]{.class_s321}

[The ]{.class_s321}["knowledge of God" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 1) is what is missing in Israel. Our word is "THEOLOGY." And as surely as ]{.class_s321}[demonology ]{.class_s322}[replaced ]{.class_s321}[theology ]{.class_s322}[in Israel (see 4:12--13), demonology will replace "science" and "theology" in America in the next twenty years. When men like Malcom Boyd, Timothy O'Leary, Rheinhold Niebhur, Paul Tillich, and Sartre are called "theologians," it is all over but the burying. ]{.class_s321}[Not a man in the list professed to know God as well as you know your county solicitor. ]{.class_s322}[You see, there is no ]{.class_s321}["knowledge of God"]{.class_s323}[ apart from God's revelation of Himself. God is never under the microscope or swimming in the test tube, and He has never subjected Himself to man's scrutiny ]{.class_s321}[apart from his written word ]{.class_s322}[(Psa. 119:89, 130) and His incarnate Messiah. You may behold the ]{.class_s321}["glory of God" ]{.class_s323}[and His ]{.class_s321}["handywork" ]{.class_s323}[(Psa. 19:1--4), but that is not GOD, and no amount of "scientific achievement" or "scientific advancement" or "scientific research" or "scientific breakthroughs" have ever (or will ever) revealed ANYTHING about the true God that is not found in a ]{.class_s321}[King James 1611 Authorized Version.]{.class_s322}

[Observe that the priest who was entrusted with keeping knowledge (Mal. 2:7) rejected (vs. 6), and thus (like Eli, 1 Sam. 2:12, 17) God rejects His ]{.class_s321}["children" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 6). The death of Hophni and Phineas in battle illustrates verse 6 so well that further comment would be superfluous. The modern priest who rejects the written revelation of God (Jer. 23:16) and the modern "prophet" who refuses to preach it (Jer. 23:26) form the foundation of the National Council of Churches, the Roman Catholic church, the Greek Orthodox church, and the World Council of Churches. (So, as we have stated more than once, the modern Premillennial, Conservative scholar who rejects the written revelation of the words of God is just as much a dirty, low down, lying Judas Iscariot as the worst Jesuit that Bloody Mary ever sent on a killing mission.)]{.class_s321}

"[As they were increased, so they sinned against me" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 7), []{#cB9.xhtml_page_57}in reference to the children of the priest, and ]{.class_s321}["therefore will I change their glory into shame" ]{.class_s323}[(1 Sam. 2:33--34).]{.class_s321}

"[Like people, like priest" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 9) \[cf. 1 Sam. 24:2; Jer. 5:31, and especially Malachi 2:2\]. Here God warns that He will remove the barriers set up between "clergy and laity" and that the Levitical priesthood will no longer enjoy its separation, distinction, or priveleges. You see, the Bible-rejecting priest is no different from any drunken bum; so, of this kind of "priest" the Lord said, ]{.class_s321}["I will corrupt your seed and spread dung upon your faces" ]{.class_s323}[(Mal. 2:3).]{.class_s321}

"[They eat up the sin of my people, and they set their heart on their iniquity" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 8). The priests are enjoying the food brought to them (1 Sam. 2:15--16) by the "sinners," and they secretly hope that more sins will be committed so more offerings will be brought (Lev. 1--9). They set their heart on ]{.class_s321}["their" ]{.class_s323}[(Israel's) iniquity. The result of this heart attitude (coveting) is that they shall ]{.class_s321}["not have enough" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 10). Like the stupid Americans, described in Haggai 1:5--6, or the stupid Europeans, described in Isaiah 55:2, they need to learn that a full belly (Luke 12:19) and a full bankroll (Luke 12:18) do not necessarily mean ]{.class_s321}["abundance" ]{.class_s323}[(Luke 12:15). Solomon couldn't get enough money, wine, women, and food to give himself a cheerful outlook on life.]{.class_s321}

"[They shall commit whoredom, and shall not increase" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 10). See 1 Samuel 2:22--24 for an exact illustration of the prophecy. ]{.class_s321}["Because they have left off to take heed to the LORD" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 10). See comment under Exodus 34:12 in that Commentary.]{.class_s321}

"[Whoredom and wine and new wine" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 11). The verse is used by moderate drinkers in the Baptist and Methodist churches (following the drunks in the Catholic and Episcopal churches) to prove that NEW WINE must be fermented, but this, of course, is a gross error. What is condemned in the verse is good ]{.class_s321}[and ]{.class_s322}[bad things (see notes on 3:4). ]{.class_s321}["New wine" ]{.class_s323}[is clearly unfermented grape juice, if you are not a lush. And if you have been deceived by the Devil instructing you through some "devoted, godly, dedicated so forth and-so on" then you have a chance to redeem yourself by taking a clear cut stand with Genesis 40:10--14; Isaiah 65:8; Deuteronomy 32:14; and Matthew 26:29 AGAINST HIM. []{#cB9.xhtml_page_58}Do it at once. ]{.class_s321}[Delay is dangerous. ]{.class_s322}[Always take a clear cut stand---immediately---against any godly, dedicated, Conservative, soulwinning, premillennial, scholarly, educated, "recognized" SINNER who perverts the living word of the living God (Jer. 23:35--36). The Lord will bless you for it.]{.class_s321}

"[New wine" ]{.class_s323}[will certainly ]{.class_s321}["take away the heart," ]{.class_s323}[as it symbolizes material prosperity (Neh. 13:15; Num. 18:27; Matt. 21:33; etc.). It is the prospectus of the producers of new wine that causes the death of God's son in the parable in Matthew 21, and in 1 Kings 21:1--2 the same motive causes the death of Naboth; and ]{.class_s321}[no one was drunk in either passage in either Testament. ]{.class_s322}[\[It is strange to observe the lengths to which some winos will go to get what is forbidden to kings (Prov. 31:4) when these same conceited ignoramuses (Paul's terminology---Rom. 11:25---not mine) profess to be reigning with Christ now! Isaiah 24:7--9 explains the text exactly.\]]{.class_s321}

4:12 My people ask counsel at their stocks, and their staff declareth unto them: for the spirit of whoredoms hath caused them to err, and they have gone a whoring from under their God.

13 They sacrifice upon the tops of the mountains, and burn incense upon the hills, under oaks and poplars and elms, because the shadow thereof is good: therefore your daughters shall commit whoredom, and your spouses shall commit adultery.

14 I will not punish your daughters when they commit whoredom, nor your spouses when they commit adultery: for themselves are separated with whores, and they sacrifice with harlots: therefore the people that doth not understand shall fall.

"[The spirit of whoredoms" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 12) is the choice title that God gives []{#cB9.xhtml_page_59}to the operation of Ouija boards and rapping tables (Isa. 40:19; Jer. 2:27). The ]{.class_s321}["seducing spirits" ]{.class_s323}[of the New Testament (1 Tim. 4:1--4) are kin to ]{.class_s321}["doctrines of DEVILS," ]{.class_s323}[and no amount of static about "white witches" and "good covens" and "white magic" or Jean Dixon will ever overrule the judgment of God in these matters (Deut. 18:10--12). God will allow no sinner the luxury of putting a "positive" construction on what God has revealed as ]{.class_s321}[demonic ]{.class_s322}[and ]{.class_s321}[wicked ]{.class_s322}["rabdomancy" is the name given to people who use sticks and staffs to predict the future or seek advice on problems. The "stock" of verse 12 is described in Isaiah 44:14, 17, 19---note, ]{.class_s321}["shall I fall down TO THE STOCK OF A TREE?"]{.class_s323}

"[They sacrifice upon the tops of the mountains\...oaks" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 13). The high places originate with Noah (Gen. 8:20) and were tolerated before the law (Gen. 12:8). The natural suggestion of such offerings in such places is man's trying to get as high UP toward God as he can get; but this, of course, has overtones (Isa. 14:13) connected with it that every Bible believer is aware of (John 3:13). Under the Palestinian monarchy the ]{.class_s321}["high places" ]{.class_s323}[were to be destroyed (2 Kings 14:4), for a central place of worship (Deut. 16:6--7) had been established (1 Chron. 22:1).]{.class_s321}

[Since the "oaks" form the central theme of tree worship, they are named first. The sacred oaks of the druids and the German pagans are well known, but what is not so well known is the Biblical association of the oak with the Antichrist (2 Sam. 18:9), with demon worship (Isa. 1:29; Hosea 4:13) and with the ]{.class_s321}["bulls of Bashan" ]{.class_s323}[(Psa. 22:12; Zech. 11:2). The last reference points us to Calvary (Psa. 22:1--12), and as surely as Scripture with Scripture will yield the right interpretation, the right tree for Calvary's cross would be an ]{.class_s321}[oak, ]{.class_s322}[not a "dogwood" tree.]{.class_s321}

"[I will NOT punish your daughters when they commit whoredom\...therefore the people that doth not understand shall FALL"]{.class_s323}[ (vs. 14). We should notice that God DOES punish the daughters, spouses, etc., but His meaning is that He will not punish them ]{.class_s321}[immediately ]{.class_s322}[when they sin (Ecc. 8:11). Their punishments await the coming of Shalmaneser []{#cB9.xhtml_page_60}(2 Kings 17). That is, the worst thing that God can do to a man or nation is ]{.class_s321}[let them get away with sin ]{.class_s322}[(Jer. 6:19).]{.class_s321}

[The most ominous shadow that ever fell across the United States of America was God's ]{.class_s321}[preventing ]{.class_s322}[Hitler from taking England and eventually crossing the Atlantic. God punished England for reneging on the Balfour Declaration. God reduced her to a fifth rate power after she had been the mightiest nation on earth. God punished Germany for her treatment of the Jew. But God let America win World War II and go right on as the leading nation in the world after she officially voted to make herself a nation of drunkards (1933) and then set up a Comintern which could force American children to board buses, to attend preselected schools, and to "socialize" with a government choice of "friends."]{.class_s321}

[No choice came "from the people, by the people or for the people." And when Abe Lincoln filched that phrase from 1384 (it was originally spoken by John Wycliffe in regard to the Bible) he said in the same breath, "I am not, nor ever have been, in favor of bringing about IN ANY WAY the social and political equality of the white and black RACES. There is a ]{.class_s321}[physical difference ]{.class_s322}[between the white and black RACES which I believe will forever forbid the two RACES living together on terms of social and political ]{.class_s321}[equality]{.class_s322}["]{.class_s321}[ ]{.class_s322}[(Charleston, Illinois, September 18, 1858). Abe Lincoln, as any intelligent man, was a RACIST; he knew that corn is not cantaloupe, bananas are not peanuts, dogs are not white rats, and traffic lights have more than one color.]{.class_s321}

America got away with teaching evolution in its schools, and it still survives today trying to justify homosexuality. It still survives, forcing its school children to read filthy pornography and obscene doggerel (W. Virginia, 1974), and God has not yet lowered the boom on America, although she has set up a president, vice president, integration program, income tax system, busing system, draft system, and HEW regulations that no one voted on once, anywhere, in the history of the nation.

[God is letting America coast]{.class_s321}[---down hill.]{.class_s322}

"[Therefore the people\...shall fall" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 14).]{.class_s321}

God doesn't trouble any whore in Israel with the "priest" of Numbers 5 and the "chastity oath" of Numbers 5:10--18. He just lets the nation "drive before the wind" under full sail and "gives them up" (Rom. 1:18--28).

15 Though thou, Israel, play the harlot, yet let not Judah offend; and come not ye unto Gilgal, neither go ye up to Bethaven, nor swear, The LORD liveth.

16 For Israel slideth back as a backsliding heifer: now the LORD will feed them as a lamb in a large place.

17 Ephraim is joined to idols: let him alone.

18 Their drink is sour: they have committed whoredom continually: her rulers with shame do love, Give ye.

19 The wind hath bound her up in her wings, and they shall be ashamed because of their sacrifices.

[Although Judah still ]{.class_s321}["ruleth with God, and is faithful with the saintie' ]{.class_s323}[(Hosea 11:12), she is warned about following the example of her northern brethren: ]{.class_s321}["yet let not Judah offend" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 15). Bethel, Gilgal, and Bethaven turn out to be the religious hellholes of apostate Israel (see Amos' sarcastic invitation in Amos 4:4).]{.class_s321}

Gilgal is associated with Israel's request for a king to replace God (1 Sam. 7:16, 10:8), and Bethel is connected with the sacred memories of God's covenant with Jacob (Gen. 35:11).

[Bethaven was the suburb of Bethel where Jeroboam set up the golden calf (1 Kings 12:28--30). The mistaken notion of ]{.class_s321}[The Pulpit Commentary ]{.class_s322}[that Bethel had "become Bethaven" (the "house of God" had become the "house of iniquity") overlooks the Biblical fact that ]{.class_s321}[Bethaven ]{.class_s322}[was a town in Joshua 7:2 and 18:12 a thousand years ]{.class_s321}[before ]{.class_s322}[Israel went into apostasy. It is true (see comments under Amos 4:4) that Bethel had become ]{.class_s321}["the king's chapel" ]{.class_s323}[but the name of the town ]{.class_s321}["Bethaven"]{.class_s323}[ was established long before Bethel []{#cB9.xhtml_page_62}became the "house of iniquity."]{.class_s321}

[Sometimes a little reading in the ]{.class_s321}[Authorized Bible]{.class_s322}[ is of great help in correcting the Hebrew scholarship of the greatest Conservative linguists that Christian education has ever produced.]{.class_s321}

[Places of sacred association can often become phenomenal pigstys after a revival or moving of the Holy Spirit. Nothing is deader than an evangelistic church that has been taken over by professional promoters of Christian "enterprises" when it had once heard the songs of Zion and echoed with the praises of God. Nothing was more unholy or ungodly than New England Christianity after the Second Great Awakening (1820--1940). In the vacuum created by the absence of the Holy Spirit, the professional religious swindlers moved in---Mary Baker Eddy, Emmett Fox, Emily Cady, C. W. Leadbetter, Annie Besant, Joe Smith, Cardinal Spellman, the ]{.class_s321}[NASV]{.class_s322}[, the National Educational Association, the Health, Education and Welfare Department, the Charismatics, Ralph Waldo Emerson, the Kennedy family, Pope Paul, Jean Dixon, and the "Upper Room."]{.class_s321}

[No spiritual man has to be told when the words ]{.class_s321}["ICHABOD" ]{.class_s323}[(1 Sam. 4:21) need to be printed over the door of a church or a school. The artificial manners, the strained politicing, the nervous waiting for the preacher to offend someone, the dismal congregational singing that required professional performers on the platform, the lack of masculine young men, the tightly controlled format of the service, and the handcuffed preacher in the pulpit tell the ghastly story only too clearly: ]{.class_s321}["the glory hath departed."]{.class_s323}

"[Nor swear, the LORD liveth" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 15). Though they swear "the Lord liveth," they are lying (Jer. 5:2). They don't know Him and they are dead to Him. For all practical purposes, they can recite with Altizer and Nietzsche, "God is dead." God is NOT the ]{.class_s321}["GOD OF THE DEAD, BUT OF THE LIVING" ]{.class_s323}[(Matt. 22:32), and you could no more find God in many a Christian work in America today than you could find a whisper in a whirlwind.]{.class_s321}

"[Now the LORD will feed them as a lamb in a]{.class_s323}[ ]{.class_s321}[large place" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 16). The backsliding nation (vs. 16) has only led the way for Judah who []{#cB9.xhtml_page_63}backslides later (Jer. 3:6). The figure is that of an obstinate cow, or ox, that will not go forward under the prodding of the goad but slips and slides backwards down a slope instead of going up it. \[Kinichi's comment on the text has nothing do to with the text, and to attain it, he had to alter the ]{.class_s321}[AV ]{.class_s322}[exactly as ]{.class_s321}[The Pulpit Commentary ]{.class_s322}[did (Vol. 13, p. 106)\]. Hosea 14:4 contains a promise that God will heal this backsliding heifer.]{.class_s321}

Isaiah 5:17 shows us the distinction between a sheep fed by a shepherd in a pasture and a sheep lost in the wilderness (Luke 15:4) roaming the range trying to find food, as here,

"[Feed them as a lamb IN A LARGE PLACE."]{.class_s323}[ In typology, the reference is to the world, itself, where Israel will "stray" like lost sheep on the mountains (Ezek. 34:5--6) until the Good Shepherd (Ezek. 34:11--31) comes after them (John 10:11).]{.class_s321}

"[Ephraim is joined to idols: LET HIM ALONE" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 17). There is the death sentence again. When God gives a man up (or a nation---Rom. 1:24) and allows him to follow his reasoning powers, his instincts, his philosophy, and his "native intelligence," he has "had it." The liberation the modern man wants is actually his DAMNATION (Psa. 2:1--3). The "liberty" and "permissiveness" that America is teaching young people in the school system is forging a ball and chain around their souls that no acetylene torch on earth could sunder. ]{.class_s321}[Liberty is ]{.class_s322}[not license to do wrong. When God tells the remnant in Israel (1 Kings 12:28) not to mess with Ephraim, He has said in effect, "Abandon a sinking ship and get away from it immediately. It is going to the bottom of the ocean." ]{.class_s321}["LET HIM ALONE."]{.class_s323}[ Don't preach to him; don't rebuke him; don't give him a tract; don't pray for him (1 John 5:16); ]{.class_s321}["LET HIM ALONE."]{.class_s323}[ And when Ephraim is "left alone," he will have a companion who will stick closer than a brother according to 1 Corinthians 5:5!]{.class_s321}

"[Their drink is sour" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 18). Not only is their intake polluted but their drink offerings are no longer accepted (Mal. 1:14). Stale wine and crippled sheep (Mal. 1:8) were not the things God asked for from the nation of Israel (Lev. 4:3, 23, 28, 32, etc.).]{.class_s321}

"[Her rulers with shame do love, GIVE YE"]{.class_s323}[ (vs. 18). That is, the rulers of Israel had fallen in love with their own belly (Rom. 16:18). The expression ]{.class_s321}["GIVE YE!"]{.class_s323}[ (imperative) had become the byword of the national leaders (see Prov. 23:10 and comments in that Commentary). When their president tried to stop inflation, he said, "Raise the gas tax" (]{.class_s321}["Give ye"]{.class_s323}[). When another president tried to get them to go out and fight (to keep his church in power in Vietnam), he said, "Say not what my country can do for me, but what I can do for my country" (]{.class_s321}["Give ye"]{.class_s323}[). When they paraded in "demonstrations," they preached, "Let there be a guaranteed income and old age pension and medicare" (]{.class_s321}["Give ye"]{.class_s323}[). And when they went to church, they saw signs plastered all over the building saying, "the tithe is the Lord's," and every sermon ended with "shell out" (]{.class_s321}["Give ye"]{.class_s323}[). Since it is more blessed to GIVE than to receive, one may say that at least their rulers decided to let ]{.class_s321}[them ]{.class_s322}[get the blessing while the country went to Hell.]{.class_s321}

[Naturally, all of the commentators are very anxious to alter the text at this point (see below), especially revisors like Kenneth Taylor, who paraphrased the ]{.class_s321}[real ]{.class_s322}["Living" Bible, and told you exactly what the verse meant: i.e., "if you support us, love for shame is greater than for honour." But Micah 3:5 told you exactly what the verse meant: i.e., if you support us you are all right (Matt. 15:5) and if you ]{.class_s321}[don't]{.class_s322}[ you are a rascal (John 11:48). The BELLY often appears as a "united drive" or "community chest" or "cooperative program" or "missionary program," and it has been known to appear as a "newer translation" from "more accurate manuscripts" and the "original Greek text." There are a lot of "belly dancers" these days, and they are not all shimmying in movies in the theater or on the TV screen.]{.class_s321}

"[The wind hath bound her up in her wings" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 19). Israel is chaff (Dan. 2:35) about to blow away over the threshing floor (Psa. 1:4 and Hosea 13:3). ]{.class_s321}["And they shall be ashamed because of their sacrifices" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 19) \[cf. Micah 2:5; Isa. 1:29; and Jer. 2:26\]. The verse has been called a "scrap" that doesn't belong in Hosea, and many of the commentators say that it is so confused as to be unintelligible. Well, it takes a confused man to know one. []{#cB9.xhtml_page_65}There must be something wrong with the ]{.class_s321}["sacrifices"]{.class_s323}[ (1 Sam. 15:22) of some of our dearly beloved brethren (Prov. 15:8) that bothers them, for the verse is one of the easiest in Hosea. Israel had hoped that an abundance of sacrifices and drink offerings would bring her prosperity (Prov. 3:9--10). But as Isaiah said to the rulers of Sodom and Gomorrah (Isa. 1:10--11), the Lord cares nothing about ]{.class_s321}["sacrifices"]{.class_s323}[ (the "mass," for example) where the dirty, God forsaken rascal who is offering it (the "mass," for example) has made the word of God of ]{.class_s321}["none effect"]{.class_s323}[ by his tradition (Mark 7:9--13) and is "smiting the rock" weekly (Num. 20:11) where it only had to be smitten ONCE (Exod. 17:6). Moses ]{.class_s321}[was prohibited from entering the promised land because he treated the Rock like a Catholic priest treats it ]{.class_s322}[(in the "mass," for example)!]{.class_s321}

Before continuing into chapter 5 of Hosea we shall take out a few minutes to see how the Conservative scholars and Christian educators are mishandling the words of the living God.

1\. Nowack, Marti, Orelli and Guthe suggest seventy-five changes in the Authorized text, though not one of the changes sheds any light on anything Hosea said that is not found in the text of 1611.

[2. The LXX---the Alexandrian ]{.class_s321}[NASV ]{.class_s322}[manuscripts from 330 A.D.---has substituted "as a priest spoken against" for the correct reading of verse 4. It has also changed verse 5 to read, "I have compared thy mother to night," and then changed ]{.class_s321}["sacrifices"]{.class_s323}[ (vs. 19) to "altars." \[What ]{.class_s321}[The Pulpit Commentary ]{.class_s322}[calls "The LXX" is, quite naturally, the ]{.class_s321}[fifth column of Origen's Hexapla ]{.class_s322}[written many years after the completion of the New Testament. This is S.O.P. in orthodox circles where "godly" liars and "dedicated" crooks slander the memory of the dead (the ]{.class_s321}[honest ]{.class_s322}[dead) by recommending the corrections of A. T. CHAPTER FIVE

5:1 Hear ye this, O priests; and hearken, ye house of Israel; and give ye ear, O house of the king; for judgment is toward you, because ye have been a snare on Mizpah, and a net spread upon Tabor.

2 And the revolters are profound to make slaughter, though I have been a rebuker of them all.

3 I know Ephraim, and Israel is not hid from me: for now, O Ephraim, thou committest whoredom, and Israel is defiled.

4 They will not frame their doings to turn unto their God: for the spirit of whoredoms is in the midst of them, and they have not known the LORD.

5 And the pride of Israel doth testify to his face: therefore shall Israel and Ephraim fall in their iniquity; Judah also shall fall with them.

6 They shall go with their flocks and with their herds to seek the LORD; but they shall not find him; he hath withdrawn himself from them.

7 They have dealt treacherously against the LORD: for they have begotten strange children: now shall a month devour them with their portions.

[The first verse is addressed to the priests, the house of Israel and the royal family of the king, for ]{.class_s321}["judgment is towards YOU" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 1). A church state setup led by the king and the priest (see Saul's intrusion into the office) is responsible for the wretched condition that Israel finds herself in. Behind every tragedy in national catastrophes in Western civilizations will be found the priest and the "king," and whether this unholy and ungodly combination triggers the Bolshevist Revolution (1918) or the French Revolution (1789) or whether it []{#cDZ.xhtml_page_68}manipulates the "Centre Party" to put Hitler in power (1930--1936) or whether it borrows the United States Army and Navy to go to Vietnam to get massacred (1965--1972), it is the same bloody mafia of "hoods" (1 Kings 18:22--29). Sometimes it is found in Charlemagne massacring Saxons so the Pope won't have to worry about invasions; sometimes it is found in the bodies of Crusaders rotting on the beaches of Palestine (1000--1200) as they tried to give the Unholy Mother Harlot (Rev. 17:1--9) more property, and sometimes it is found in the dead body of a president (Abraham Lincoln) whose assassination was plotted, planned, and carried out by the old "church state" mafia (see ]{.class_s321}["The Sure Word of Prophecy," ]{.class_s322}[1969).]{.class_s321}

"[A snare on Mizpah, and a net spread upon Tabor" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 1). The priest king setup (religio political bossism) is catching man like a hunter or fowler catches his prey. The hunters involved are described in Jeremiah 5:26--29: ]{.class_s321}["they catch men."]{.class_s323}[ ]{.class_s321}[Mizpah]{.class_s322}[ is in Gilead east of Jordan; ]{.class_s321}[Tabor ]{.class_s322}[is a mountain west of Jordan.]{.class_s321}

[Verse 2 is self explanatory. The people have ]{.class_s321}["revolted and gone"]{.class_s323}[ (Jer. 5:23), and although God has rebuked the killers among them (see Barabbas, Luke 23:19), they go right on killing. Isaiah 1:5 and Hosea 9:15 tell us that the ]{.class_s321}["revolters"]{.class_s323}[ are the princes in the ]{.class_s321}["house of the king" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 1). In Judah, Jeconiah and Zedekiah are prime examples (Jer. 40--48).]{.class_s321}

[Verse 3 is self explanatory: God knows their sins and their wickedness. The two terms ]{.class_s321}["Ephraim" ]{.class_s323}[and ]{.class_s321}["Israel"]{.class_s323}[ imply that the leading tribe (Ephraim) is to bear the blame falling on the other nine tribes (Israel).]{.class_s321}

[Verse 4 is self explanatory. When a man "frames" something he has to measure and cut it to fit what he is trying to match. The Israelites were not even trying to amend their ways (vs. 4). At least the Ephraimites of Judges tried to pronounce the word (Judg. 12:6) right! ]{.class_s321}["And they have NOT KNOWN THE LORD" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 4). Eventually there arises a generation that "knows not the Lord" (Judg. 2:10) if the priests keep spending their time telling citizens how to vote or where to get their bingo cards instead of teaching the Bible. (What could be more absurd than a so called "priest" lobbying Congress to get Protestant tax []{#cDZ.xhtml_page_69}money for Catholic school buses so that American children would be misled into thinking the Catholic church is a Bible-believing outfit?) The generation of Israelites who knew not the Lord had "no knowledge of God" (Judg. 2:10) because the people to whom theology was given as a sacred trust had been spending their time trying to stay in good with apostate kings (Jer. 28 and 38; 1 Kings 22:10, 12). And since Judah soon began to follow suit (see Manasseh's reign, 2 Kings 21:1--6), Hosea lets a bomb drop right in the middle of his message to Israel: ]{.class_s321}["JUDAH ALSO SHALL FALL WITH THEM"]{.class_s323}[ (vs. 5).]{.class_s321}

"[And the pride of Israel doth testify to his face" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 5). The verse is to be read in connection with 7:9, 10 (see comments under Prov. 21:29 in that Commentary). The flocks and herds that the Israelites will bring as sacrifices (vs. 6) will do them no good, for they are to be brought to Jerusalem (2 Chron. 13:8 11), not to Bethel or to Dan (1 Kings 12:28--29). ]{.class_s321}["He hath withdrawn himself from them" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 6). This is the ]{.class_s321}[man ]{.class_s322}[hiding (Matt. 13:44)---not the ]{.class_s321}[treasure ]{.class_s322}[being hidden again---in the parable of Israel's dispersion (Matt. 13:44). "[For they have begotten strange children"]{.class_s323}[ (vs. 7) \[cf. 1:2 and 2:4\]. "[Now shall a month devour them with their portion" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 7). 8 Blow ye the cornet in Gibeah, and the trumpet in Ramah: cry aloud at Bethaven, after thee, O Benjamin.

9 Ephraim shall be desolate in the day of rebuke: among the tribes of Israel have I made known that which shall surely be.

10 The princes of Judah were like them that remove the bound: therefore I will pour out my wrath upon them like water.

11 Ephraim is oppressed and broken in judgment, []{#cDZ.xhtml_page_72}because he willingly walked after the commandment.

12 Therefore will I be unto Ephraim as a moth, and to the house of Judah as rottenness.

13 When Ephraim saw his sickness, and Judah saw his wound, then went Ephraim to the Assyrian, and sent to king Jareb: yet could he not heal you, nor cure you of your wound.

14 For I will be unto Ephraim as a lion, and as a young lion to the house of Judah: I, even I, will tear and go away; I will take away, and none shall rescue him.

15 I will go and return to my place, till they acknowledge their offence, and seek my face: in their affliction they will seek me early.

[Having warned Judah that "hard times are coming," Hosea drops two more devotional "nuggets" their way: ]{.class_s321}["The princes of Judah\...I will pour out my wrath upon them like water" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 10) and ]{.class_s321}["For I will be\...as a young lion to the house of Judah" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 14).]{.class_s321}

[Jeremiah 4:5 interprets verse 8 for us and tells us that God is mocking Israel and telling them to muster the troops and get ready for battle. ]{.class_s321}["After thee, O Benjamin!" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 8) is as good a battle cry as you ever heard because Benjamin was by far the toughest tribe of the twelve. Matching the courage and morale of the Germans, little Benjamin could whip eleven tribes to a standstill two times running, and two of the most vicious persecutors Israel produced came from Benjamin: Saul, the Old Testament demonic suicide, and Saul, the New Testament spirit filled martyr. The war cry is found in Judges 5:14. The only problem here is that Benjamin ]{.class_s321}[is still loyal to Judah ]{.class_s322}[(1 Kings 11:36). The millennial old offer of Judah to take Benjamin's place (Gen. 44:33) was never forgotten by the tribesmen of Benjamin (2 Chron. 15:8).]{.class_s321}

[The Pulpit Commentary ]{.class_s322}[ignores the Scriptural crossreferences and insists that the enemy is "after" Benjamin; so, Benjamin had better run for his life. But the context shows Israel getting ready to fight: ]{.class_s321}["Blow ye the []{#cDZ.xhtml_page_73}cornet\...and the trumpet" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 8). No one is sounding a ]{.class_s321}[retreat. ]{.class_s322}[God is telling them to gird their armor on and prepare for action because they are going to get it (Isa. 10:28 32).]{.class_s321}

Verse 9 in self explanatory.

"[The princes of Judah were like them that remove the BOUND" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 10). That is, they were followers of the NAACP and the District Court Judges who turned Boston (1975) into a nightmare. The "bounds" are set to keep you "in bounds" (Exod. 23:31), and the one who ]{.class_s321}[set ]{.class_s322}[the bounds (Psa. 104:9) set them (Acts 17:26) so that men could get ]{.class_s321}[saved ]{.class_s322}[(Acts 17:26--27). "[Ephraim is oppressed\...because he willingly walked AFTER the commandment" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 11). That is, like a good Protestant he should have protested and resisted. He had no business following ]{.class_s321}["the powers that be"]{.class_s323}[ (Rom. 13:1--4) where they commanded him to violate the []{#cDZ.xhtml_page_74}second commandment (1 Kings 12:32). And woe to any religious system that leaves out the second commandment (Exod. 20:4) and makes two out of the tenth commandment to get the required number and then COMMANDS its constituents to "use images as an AID to worship" (Hosea 10:5 and 13:2)! Verse 12 is self explanatory. God's dealing with Ephraim and Judah will produce a scene like a man would find if he opened up a clothes closet that had been a home for moths for several years. The other picture is the picture of an unpainted fence post (or telephone pole) set out in a field in a climate like southern Louisiana or southern Mississippi. As the British say, "It looks like the jolly old rot 'as set in."

"[When Ephraim saw his sickness, and Judah saw his wound" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 13). Ephraim goes to the Assyrian first (vs. 13) and Judah later (2 Kings 18:14--15) trying to play hankypanky with the Devil's representative (Isa. 10:5--19). Ephraim contacts ]{.class_s321}["JAREB."]{.class_s323}[ According to Professor Sayce, this is the birth name of Sargon II (]{.class_s321}[Higher Criticism and the Monument, ]{.class_s322}[p. 416) who followed Shalmaneser (1 Kings 17). But our Assyrian king that everyone has such a hard time locating is not too hard to locate if we believe Revelation 13:18 and check Numbers 13:13 carefully. ]{.class_s321}["Jareb" ]{.class_s323}[is from the Hebrew root for "contention, the contender, or THE ADVERSARY," and all doubt about his identity is dispelled by a careful reading of Isaiah 10 and Hosea 13:8.]{.class_s321}

"[Yet could he not heal you, nor cure you of your wound" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 13). There is a perfect illustration of this in the New Testament (Luke 8:43); in the Old Testament (2 Kings 16: 10), Judah goes to the Assyrians for help exactly as Israel did (see Hosea 5:13, and notice how John Calvin refused to check the references and said Judah did not do it!). In 2 Kings 16 Ahaz has his priest (see comments under 5:1) fashion him an Assyrian altar because he went to the Assyrian king to get help in a war and got it (2 Kings 16:8--9). This pagan contraption was then brought into the court of the Tabernacle to replace the brazen altar whose pattern David gave to Solomon, under the inspiration of the []{#cDZ.xhtml_page_75}Holy Spirit (1 Chron. 28:12).]{.class_s321}

[Historical illustrations are too many to number. There were Vietnam (1965) and Korea (1951) looking to the USA for "help," and all they got out of it was 500,000 orphans, ruined farm lands, 900,000 casualties, and a demagogue to run their governments. There was Chiang Kai shek (1970) looking to America for help and getting nothing but a "get well" card with "condolences" written on it. There was America (1938--1945) running to an atheistic nation three times her size to get help in whipping a country the size of Oregon; all America got out of it was twenty more enemies, a national debt of \$8,000,000,000 (which will never be paid back), and foreign entanglements that prevented her from whipping two countries the size of Vermont. Leaning on a broken reed (Isa. 36:6) will drive splinters up your arm or, at least, land you flat on your face in the rice paddy. Any time a country delivers its future to the CFR, the NAACP, or UNESCO, it is asking for poverty, war, disease, pain, indebtedness, and the wrath of God. "[I will go and return to my place, till they acknowledge their offence, and seek my face: in their affliction they will seek me early" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 15). "[Hear this some of you people up there at the top. I am put out with you because you are like they used to net fish, or was it fowl (?), on some place that was good hunting in Palestine. I was the glory of Israel so I am testifying to their face that their children are illegitimate and in several hours, minutes, days, weeks or months they are going to lose their idols, or was it fields? Blow up a storm at one place (that might be another place), and is often confused with a third one because the princes took up the bench markers so a waterfall is going to knock them flat. Ephraim ran up to see a city or town or some king or other to get help, and a running sore was about the same as an open wound, but they will seek me when I attack as a lion, except for about 4,000,000 of them who will wait 2,500 years."]{.class_s321}

Why do it the hard way, son? Why not just clean off the shelf, dust it and then put the whole cotton picking library in the trash can, keeping only the words and clauses that agree with the Authorized Text?

The passage dates the Second Advent of Christ according to God's calendar, and aside from the variations between Gentile and Hebrew calendars (introducing variables which no man can be sure of), the date given is A.D. 2000 at the Feast of Tabernacles.

Briefly, God's timetable (as his color table, note table, cell table, biology table, and universe table) is laid out in SEVENS: seven days (Gen. 2:1--2), seven weeks (Lev. 23:15), seven months (Lev. 23:27), seven years (Exod. 21:2), forty nine years (Lev. 25:8), seven ages (Gen. 1:1,3, Gen. 6--8, Gen. 9--Rev. 20), and seven millenniums (2 Pet. 3:6--10 and Rev. 21--22). "[Gilead"]{.class_s323}[ (vs. 8). The area is on the east of Jordan. The reader should notice how God uses His language---not always in the best of grammar (plural subjects with singular verbs) and not always with the pinpoint accuracy which Pharisees and hypocrites demand of Him (see John for example). There is no "city" called "Gilead" given in the Scriptures; the region is a mountainous region across Jordan on the east and northeast, its most prominent city being Ramoth Gilead. The only intimation that a city is called by that name is found in 2 Kings 15:29 where at least two cities are mentioned: ]{.class_s321}["Abel beth maschah" ]{.class_s323}[and ]{.class_s321}["Hazor"]{.class_s323}[ and possibly ]{.class_s321}["Kedesh." "Gilead"]{.class_s323}[ is given in that list although "all the land of Naphtali" and "Galilee" are areas.]{.class_s321}

[2. The priests did not commit ]{.class_s321}["lewdness"]{.class_s323}[;]{.class_s321}[ ]{.class_s323}[they committed "enormity" []{#cG7.xhtml_page_89}(Ibid., p. 171).]{.class_s321}

3\. The LXX has added "saying" to verse 1 so that you would think Hosea 5:15 and 6:1 were the same contextthe distant past (822 B.C.).

[4. Verse 3 should be "let us therefore now, hunt after the knowledge of Jehovah" ]{.class_s321}[(The Pulpit Commentary, ]{.class_s322}[p. 167).]{.class_s321}

5\. Verse 3 is a picture of the FIRST Advent, not the Second (Ibid., p. 171).

6\. Durnmelow says we should follow Origen's LXX (A.D. 200) in verse 5 instead of the Authorized Text.

[7. The ]{.class_s321}[RV ]{.class_s322}[(1884) has written "LIKE ADAM" (vs. 7) to soothe the depraved populace of 1800--1980. The ]{.class_s321}[RSV ]{.class_s322}[made it "AT ADAM" (referring to the town in Josh. 3:16), following the blind lead of Moffatt's translation.]{.class_s321}

8\. Christ is the "ideal Israel" (Jamieson, Fausset, and Brown), so the "days" of Hosea 6:2--3 are a reference to the resurrection of Christ.

[9. Keil, Pusey, Hitzig, and Wunche think that ]{.class_s321}["men"]{.class_s323}[ should be "ADAM" while Guthe thinks it should be "some city." Since not a man in the list could master the rudimentary elements of ]{.class_s321}[his own language ]{.class_s322}[where it dealt with the Second Coming, there isn't any point in any Bible believer on earth tipping his hat when passing the whole crew.]{.class_s321}

10\. Ewald, Nowack and Martoi (between them) suggest fifty alterations in the 11 verses, which is more than four per verse.

[11. The "funny bunnies" (]{.class_s321}[NASV]{.class_s322}[, ]{.class_s321}[The Living Bible]{.class_s322}[, and ]{.class_s321}[The New English Bible]{.class_s322}[) say:]{.class_s321}

[a. The Lord doesn't show up in verse 3, only His "justice' shows up (]{.class_s321}[NEB]{.class_s322}[).]{.class_s321}

[b. The Lord doesn't come with the rain; "IT" comes (vs. 3, ]{.class_s321}[NEB]{.class_s322}[).]{.class_s321}

[c. God doesn't want to show anybody ]{.class_s321}["MERCY"]{.class_s323}[; He wants them to be "loyal" (vs. 6) (]{.class_s321}[NEB]{.class_s322}[). C. H. Dodd doing this after translating it as ]{.class_s321}["MERCY"]{.class_s323}[ where Jesus Christ quotes the verse in Matthew 9:13! (Ain't we got some winners!!)]{.class_s321}

[d. Judah never will have its captivity returned in verse 11 (]{.class_s321}[NEB]{.class_s322}[).]{.class_s321}

[e. The Lord does not come AS the dawn; His coming is as "certain as the dawn" (vs. 3, ]{.class_s321}[NASV]{.class_s322}[, Lockman Foundation).]{.class_s321}

[f. The word ]{.class_s321}["thy"]{.class_s323}[ has been removed from all the Hebrew manuscripts at verse 5 (]{.class_s321}[NASV]{.class_s322}[).]{.class_s321}

[g. The substitution "ADAM" has been made in verse 7 for ]{.class_s321}["MEN"]{.class_s323}[ (]{.class_s321}[NASV]{.class_s322}[).]{.class_s321}

[h. The entire second half of verse 9 has been lined up with the ]{.class_s321}[RSV ]{.class_s322}[and ]{.class_s321}[NEB---]{.class_s322}[both published by religious Liberals (]{.class_s321}[NASV]{.class_s322}[).]{.class_s321}

[i. ]{.class_s321}[The "Living" Bible ]{.class_s322}[has eliminated both the time and the subject of the post Tribulation resurrection in verses 1--2 (Kenneth Taylor Version).]{.class_s321}

[j. No Second Advent in verse 3---only a "response" (]{.class_s321}[The Living Bible]{.class_s322}[).]{.class_s321}

k\. Christ's words have been perverted at verse 6 to mean that God wanted something from Israel---which He didn't. Christ said He wanted to have MERCY on Israel (Matt. 9:13; Hosea 6:6).

[l. The entire meaning of verse 11 has been changed with the restoration done away with altogether (]{.class_s321}[The Living Bible]{.class_s322}[).]{.class_s321}

Now this is a typical sampling of the crop of great "new translations" in the "language of the people" from "older and better manuscripts" revised by dedicated men who, etc., etc. They were all translated by the "cultists."

Ain't we gonna have a revival with this crew!

[The ]{.class_s321}[NASV ]{.class_s322}[is right in the middle of them, just as putrid and as rotten and as corrupt and as depraved and as godless as any liberal translation published by the most radical Communist in the NCCC. When it comes to deliberate rejection of sound doctrine, hatred for Biblical authority, obfuscation of truth, refusal to accept advanced revelations, and resistance to the Holy Spirit, there isn't a straw to choose between the worst Liberal in London and the revision committees of the ]{.class_s321}[NIV ]{.class_s322}[and the ]{.class_s321}[NASV]{.class_s322}[; the only difference is in PROFESSION OF FAITH. All involved are engaged in one lifelong task: ]{.class_s321}[the replacing of the authority of the word of God with the Satanic guesswork of Bible-rejecting rebels. ]{.class_s322}[They constitute the greatest demoniac cult ever organized on earth.]{.class_s321}

[And let that lesson sink down deep into the soul of the real Bible believer. Not once in 200 corrections so far---we have listed only about one fourth of the []{#cG7.xhtml_page_91}corrections made by Fundamentalists, Conservatives, Liberals, and Catholics on the first six chapters of Hosea---not once, I say, have the cultists ever been right or half right or one quarter right, ]{.class_s321}[except where they agreed with the King James text. ]{.class_s322}[\[We realize that there are still many unanswered questions in the mind of the believer about the "original Greek" which time and space forbid answering, but let the reader be assured that at the Pensacola Bible Institute we teach nineteen to twenty-five year old young men to correct the Greek and English text of the ]{.class_s321}[NASV]{.class_s322}[, and not once have we found a criticism of the ]{.class_s321}[AV ]{.class_s322}[(1611) text to be valid when run right down, cornered, treed, flushed, and boxed. A Christian is always safe in turning up his nose at 100 percent of Conservative scholarship where it corrects the ]{.class_s321}[AV ]{.class_s322}[text.\]]{.class_s321}

[Don't ever "sweat it out" and don't ever let some pious monkey, who is covering up for his own egotism, come along and tell you that "good and ]{.class_s321}[godly ]{.class_s322}[men also took this view, therefore\...." ]{.class_s321}[Therefore, they ceased to be godly at that ]{.class_s322}[point.]{.class_s321}

[]{#cJW.xhtml}

CHAPTER SEVEN

7:1 When I would have healed Israel, then the iniquity of Ephraim was discovered, and the wickedness of Samaria: for they commit falsehood; and the thief cometh in, and the troop of robbers spoileth without.

2 And they consider not in their hearts that I remember all their wickedness: now their own doings have beset them about; they are before my face.

3 They make the king glad with their wickedness, and the princes with their lies.

4 They are all adulterers, as an oven heated by the baker, who ceaseth from raising after he hath kneaded the dough, until it be leavened.

5 In the day of our king the princes have made him sick with bottles of wine; he stretched out his hand with scorners.

6 For they have made ready their heart like an oven, whiles they lie in wait: their baker sleepeth all the night; in the morning it burneth as a flaming fire.

7 They are all hot as an oven, and have devoured their judges; all their kings are fallen: there is none among them that calleth unto me.

8 Ephraim, he hath mixed himself among the people; Ephraim is a cake not turned.

9 Strangers have devoured his strength, and he knoweth it not: yea, gray hairs are here and there upon him, yet he knoweth not.

10 And the pride of Israel testifieth to his face: and they do not return to the LORD their God, nor seek him for all this.

[Most of the chapter is self evident although it is amazing to watch the []{#cJW.xhtml_page_93}commentators and critics trying to plow their way through the traffic between verses 4--9. We often get the feeling watching these exegetical gymnastics that the real trouble with the expositor is SIN (see comments under Prov. 8:9 in that Commentary). After all, these jokers profess to believe that the Bible IS (dig ]{.class_s321}[that ]{.class_s322}[tense!) the word of God, and they will allow that the word of God is a ]{.class_s321}["discerner of the thoughts and intents of the heart" ]{.class_s323}[(Heb. 4:12). Why wouldn't a passage about a real adulterer (vs. 4) temporarily throw his clutch out in the middle of the interstate?]{.class_s321}

"[When I would have healed Israel" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 1). The LORD indicates that HE was about to send Israel a revival following the repentance of Jehoahaz who ]{.class_s321}["besought the Lord, and the LORD hearkened unto him" ]{.class_s323}[(2 Kings 13:4--5). But it didn't happen, for we read, ]{.class_s321}["there remained the grove also in SAMARIA" ]{.class_s323}[(2 Kings 13:6), and this explains our text: ]{.class_s321}["then the iniquity of Ephraim was discovered, AND THE WICKEDNESS OF SAMARIA" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 1). Joash, who followed Jehoahaz, ]{.class_s321}["departed not from all the sins of Jeroboam" ]{.class_s323}[(2 Kings 13:11), and ]{.class_s321}["now their own doings have beset them about; they are before my face" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 2). The same sins of Chapters 1--5 are enumerated: robbing, lying, adultery, and murder (vss. 1, 3, 5). ]{.class_s321}["And they consider not in their hearts that I remember all their wickedness" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 2). You see, the Lord "keeps books," and that is why David pleaded about the "sins of his youth" (Psa. 25:7) and why Job complained that he was paying for them (Job 13:26). David and Job, living 2,500 years before Columbus discovered America, had more knowledge about these matters than did Michael Luther King Jr., Cassius Clay, Lyndon Johnson, John Kennedy, Adlai Stevenson, Prime Minister Churchill, Albert Einstein, or David Lilienthal.]{.class_s321}

[One must never forget that the "god" presented by twentieth-century American educators, scientists, philosophers, and humanists is a sort of sweet old grandfather at best and only a neuter electrical field at the worst. He either tolerates sin and forgives it without requiring any more than "crying in the chapel" or he just treats it like any dog or skunk treats it---]{.class_s321}[amorally]{.class_s322}[. The modern god of []{#cJW.xhtml_page_94}Dewey, Heidegger, Russell, Von Daniken, and Sartre is nothing but a ]{.class_s321}[neuter influence ]{.class_s322}[who fluctuates from one "truth" to another, depending upon ]{.class_s321}[who ]{.class_s322}[is trying to steal ]{.class_s321}[what]{.class_s322}[. I have no more respect for the "god" of John Dewey, William James, Bernard Shaw, Mao Tse, Albert Einstein, Lenin, and Bertrand Russell than I would for a demon possessed junkie. Any god who looks at man and history as an unsaved pragmatist looks at them isn't worth the time it would take to serve him a cup of coffee. A god who cannot judge sin, save sinners, and keep his word is not Holy enough to give advice to the daughters of the American Revolution. Trade him for a used car.]{.class_s321}

[The God of Hosea (and of all the prophets for that matter) knows your downsitting and uprising (Psa. 139:2), your secret thoughts (1 Chron. 28:9), your imaginations and day dreams (2 Cor. 10:5), your motives and plans (Prov. 18:1--3), your intentions and sincerity (Ecc. 12:14), your words (Matt. 12:36), and the things you do with the sun down and the lights out (Matt. 10:26). And if your "god" cannot hold you accountable for those things in your life, then you just judge ]{.class_s321}[him ]{.class_s322}[and you'll come out just as well as the other way around. These pie faced, anemic "gods" of Europe and America (see Exod. 20:3, 4 and comments in that Commentary) can't tell enough about the future to write an editorial.]{.class_s321}

"[They make the king glad with their wickedness" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 3). They are burning up with lust all day long (see 2 Pet. 2:14 and the comments under Gen. 19--20 in that Commentary). The baker goes to sleep (vs. 6) after raising the heat of the oven (vs. 4), and as a result he has a ]{.class_s321}["cake"]{.class_s323}[ that is burned to a cinder on one side (vs. 8) and raw on the other: ]{.class_s321}[half baked.]{.class_s322}

[When we speak of half baked expositions and halfbaked upstarts in the realm of destructive criticism, we are using the term correctly. They are burned on one side and raw on the other. They accept the "scientific findings" of the "majority of scholars" without batting an eye and doubt every other verse (or every other word) in the Book by which they were saved: ]{.class_s321}[half baked]{.class_s322}

[The dough the baker uses is ]{.class_s321}["leavened"]{.class_s323}[ (vs. 4) on top of that; even Lot had better sense (Gen. 19:3), though he was living in a town that was burning []{#cJW.xhtml_page_95}with unnatural lust (Jude 7) from morning to night. Sodom, ]{.class_s321}["in the morning"]{.class_s323}[ (vs. 6), burned ]{.class_s321}["AS A FLAMING FIRE" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 6).]{.class_s321}

[The oven burned up all the judges (vs. 7) so there was no one left to "execute judgmenf' (Isa. 59:16). Then it consumed their kings so that ]{.class_s321}["there is none among them that calleth unto me" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 7). Jehoahaz was the last king Israel had who cried out to God when he got into trouble. The rest of them (Joash, Jeroboam II, Zachariah, Shallum, Pekahiah, Pekah and Hoshea) lived and died like John Dewey, Aldous Huxley, Clarke Gable, George Bernard Shaw, Karl Marx, Albert Einstein, W. C. Fields, and Bertrand Russell.]{.class_s321}

"[In the day of our king the princes have made him sick with bottles of wine" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 5) \[cf. Isa. 5:11--13\]. The king stretches out his hand ]{.class_s321}["with the scorners" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 5) like Zedekiah did in Judah (Jer. 38:5). Strife will not cease until the "scorner" is cast out (Prov. 22:10); so o o, OUT go the king, the princes, and the nation (2 Kings 17)! ]{.class_s321}["In the day of our king" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 5) implies that the king was drunk on his coronation day. (The reference is probably to Shallum, who was murdered after a six month reign.)]{.class_s321}

[Ephraim has become "integrated" (vs. 8): ]{.class_s321}["he hath MIXED HIMSELF among the people." ]{.class_s323}[That is, Ephraim fulfilled the "dream" of the Communist who said, "I had a dream," although the dream he fulfilled was a "dream" (Jer. 23:25) spoken by a lying prophet (Jer. 23:32) to whom God told NOTHING: it was a nightmare. When Israel ]{.class_s321}["mingled among the heathen" ]{.class_s323}[(Psa. 106:35), they learned their works: sodomy, beastiality, incest, laziness, lying, stealing, and Satanism.]{.class_s321}

[As a very indignant man said one time, "He may be YOUR equal"---referring to a certain run of the mill minority---"but hes not MINE." Don't tell any man who works a 60 hour week and pays his bills and fights his way up from poverty to a position of security by hard work and HONESTY, don't tell him that a lazy welfare loafer who gets "lunch money" at the point of a knife is his "EQUAL." Who are some of you crooks trying to con anyway? When was a man like Charles Manson equal to a man like Adoniram Judson? If they were both "created equal," what made the difference? Dillinger had more luxuries and []{#cJW.xhtml_page_96}money when he was in junior high than Judson had as a grown man. How come the "ghetto" didn't get to William Carey? He came from a poorer background than Angela Davis or Attorney General Mitchell! Do you think the political crooks like the Kennedys and Rockefellers were raised in ]{.class_s321}[ghettos?]{.class_s322}

"[Strangers have devoured his strength, and he knoweth it not: yea, gray hairs are here and there upon him, yet he knoweth not. And the pride of Israel testifieth to his face: and they do not return to the LORD their God, nor seek him for all this" ]{.class_s323}[(vss. 9--10).]{.class_s321}

[The passage is a classic, and it shows clearly the proper interpretation of Hosea 5:5 (see the scholarly bloopers on the verse). Here, Ephraim is likened not only to a half baked cake but to an old man who has wasted his life (see Prov. 16:31 and comments in that Commentary). One can almost hear Paul say: ]{.class_s321}["Do thy diligence to COME BEFORE WINTER" ]{.class_s323}[(2 Tim. 4:21)! The grass is buried beneath the snow and the roots of the trees lie in the coffins of ice. Now the bitter winds snap the frosted branches and fruitbearing is at an end. Opportunities to do good to others, to return favors, to show love to relatives, to receive Christ, to win others to God are over, ]{.class_s321}["COME BEFORE WINTER" ]{.class_s323}[(2 Tim. 4:21). Here Ephraim stands defiant to the end, his face creased and lined with the marks of sin, a visage stamped with broken commandments. The gray hairs begin to appear and none of them are ]{.class_s321}["in the way of righteousness" ]{.class_s323}[(see Prov. 16:31 and comments in that Commentary). Ephraim is still proud, stubborn, rebellious (1 Sam. 15:23), and, above all, self righteous. Some of YOU have left your loved ones forever and buried them in the sod. Tonight you stand like an old blasted oak on a red clay bank, with every limb gnarled and moss covered, the decayed trunk ready to topple into the ditch and be buried forever, yet still you put off receiving Christ. ]{.class_s321}["They do NOT return to the LORD their God" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 10).]{.class_s321}

[The Southland is filled with men who have heard the gospel all their lives, and many of them have Christian wives and Christian children. Time with iron shod shoes has trodden across their faces and left the hoofprints behind. Like []{#cJW.xhtml_page_97}Ephraim, they stand shorn of their power to overcome evil habit, shorn of their strength to take a stand for righteousness, and, above all, so weak spiritually that they can no longer respond to the wooing of the Holy Spirit (Prov. 1:28). ]{.class_s321}["Strangers have devoured" ]{.class_s323}[their strength and they ]{.class_s321}["knoweth it not" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 9).]{.class_s321}

Once I drew a picture of a little boy who got older and older as the chalk talk sermon progressed. He began as a sweet, rosy cheeked, healthy baby boy---momma's darling. After forty minutes of preaching and drawing, I had transformed him into a pockmarked, glaring demon. By seventy-five, "momma's darling" had become a monster. One night after I had drawn that picture, I saw an old man come up on the platform; he stood staring at it in fascination. When I asked him how he liked it, he said, "Preacher, ya done drawed my picture."

"[Well," I said, "if that's ]{.class_s321}[your ]{.class_s322}[picture, you know that man is ]{.class_s321}[unsaved, ]{.class_s322}[although he had a lifetime to get saved. If you know you're like the man in the picture, why don't you do something about it?"]{.class_s321}

I'll never forget his answer. Without taking his eyes off of that chalk talk drawing he said slowly, "Well, I guess\...I guess it's 'cause I'm just like the man in the picture." Ephraim.

11 Ephraim also is like a silly dove without heart: they call to Egypt, they go to Assyria.

12 When they shall go, I will spread my net upon them; I will bring them down as the fowls of the heaven; I will chastise them, as their congregation hath heard.

13 Woe unto them! for they have fled from me: destruction unto them! because they have transgressed against me: though I have redeemed them, yet they have spoken lies against me.

14 And they have not cried unto me with their heart, when they howled upon their beds: they assemble themselves for corn and wine, and they rebel against me.

15 Though I have bound and strengthened their arms, yet do they imagine mischief against me.

16 They return, but not to the most High: they are like a deceitful bow: their princes shall fall by the sword for the rage of their tongue: this shall be their derision in the land of Egypt.

Ephraim is fluttering around from one potential ally to another like Kissinger, "the dove of peace" (2 Kings 15, 17); anywhere but to God for help!

"[When they shall go" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 12), God spreads His net like a fowler (see Prov. 1:17 and comments in that Commentary) and chastises them (vs. 12).]{.class_s321}

[Verse 13 is self explanatory, and the last part of the verse is one of the greatest indictments that God ever gave against the body of Christ. Note that Ephraim (as the Christian) was "called out of Egypt" (Hosea 13:4). Ephraim (as the Christian) was redeemed by blood (Exod. 12:13). Ephraim (as the Christian) was led out by a Prophet-PRIEST King (see Exod. 40:29 and comments), and Ephraim was called a ]{.class_s321}["son"]{.class_s323}[ (Hosea 11:1) as a Christian is called a "son of God." With these similarities between type and reality, look at the indictment: ]{.class_s321}["Though I have REDEEMED THEM, yet they have spoken LIES AGAINST ME" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 13).]{.class_s321}

Now the Lockman Foundation or the New Scofield Board of Editors or the faculty members at Falwell schools or the Greek teachers at Dallas (or any other of the Alexandrian Cult members) need to get the message.

[A Christian is speaking LIES against God when he implies that ]{.class_s321}[forgiveness]{.class_s322}[ of sins is the same as ]{.class_s321}[REDEMPTION ]{.class_s322}[(see Col. 1:14 in any modern translation by anyone of any profession, saved or lost). A Christian is speaking LIES against God when he pretends that a registered physician called Joseph Christ's "father" (see Luke 2:33 in any modern translation by anyone saved or lost), and a Christian is speaking lies against God when he accuses God's only begotten Son of sinning when He got angry (see Matt. 5:22 []{#cJW.xhtml_page_99}in any modern translation by ]{.class_s321}[anyone, ]{.class_s322}[anytime, anywhere---saved or lost).]{.class_s321}

[Some of the greatest ]{.class_s321}[liars ]{.class_s322}[on earth today are not Liberals and Catholics, they are REDEEMED CHILDREN OF GOD IN THE BODY OF CHRIST (2 Tim. 4:18). The issue in America since 1940 has nothing to do with the "fundamentals" or "New Evangelicalism." Those are straw dummies---snowmen. The issue is this: "Is the ]{.class_s321}[Protestant Bible ]{.class_s322}[of the ]{.class_s321}[Reformation ]{.class_s322}[the ]{.class_s321}[final authority ]{.class_s322}[or is the authority a handful of conceited idiots who have followed Hort and Robertson into a ditch" (1 Tim. 6:20)? Are we Christians going to follow God's book or follow a bunch of deluded philosophers into thinking that "scientific research" is something more than selling TOOTHPASTE. In short, are we going to believe ]{.class_s321}[God]{.class_s322}[ or the ]{.class_s321}[Westcott and Hort Cult?]{.class_s322}

"[And they have not cried unto ME with their heart" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 14). When they ]{.class_s321}["howled upon their beds"]{.class_s323}[ (vs. 14) about their handicaps, hard luck, inflation, taxes, hospital bills, job layoffs, and family problems, they carried on a lonewolf monologue: God wasn't in it. When they got off their beds, they went out for a big feed or to sell something and make a killing on the market (vs. 14) and continued to ]{.class_s321}["imagine mischier, ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 15) against their Redeemer.]{.class_s321}

[God ]{.class_s321}["bound\...their arms" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 15) in the sense of binding up a wound; He strengthened their arms in the sense of 2 Kings 13:16 and 2 Samuel 22:35, ]{.class_s321}["yet do they imagine mischief" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 15) against Him.]{.class_s321}

"[They RETURN"]{.class_s323}[ (see vs. 10---]{.class_s321}["they do NOT return"]{.class_s323}[), but the trouble is that the Israelites do not return ]{.class_s321}["TO THE MOST HIGH" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 16). They ]{.class_s321}["are like a deceitful bow" ]{.class_s323}[that spits the arrow out at an angle. They are like a carbine whose sights are out of line or an artillery piece whose riflings are so worn that it can't shoot straight. Since the tongue is a]{.class_s321}[ "sword"]{.class_s323}[ (Prov. 26:22, 25:18) that a man needs to be delivered from (Job. 5:15), they fall by ]{.class_s321}["the sword for the rage of their TONGUE" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 16, with Psa. 73:9), and the inability of the forty five major commentators to exposit the expression is only a testimony to their blatant arrogance in rejecting the God given text.]{.class_s321}

"[This shall be their derision in the land of Egypt"]{.class_s323}[ (vs. 16). The ominous prophecy matches Deuteronomy 28:68, and it is fulfilled again in []{#cJW.xhtml_page_100}Isaiah 30:1--4. Hosea 9:3--6 forecasts the burial of these dispersed Israelites who return to Egypt (Deut. 28:68), according to the word of God. (Note the apparent contradiction in 11:5.)]{.class_s321}

They cannot return to God for the same reason that many a middle aged sinner in America cannot return to God: he is prevented by the force of moral gravitation, the power of habit, the hireling politicians in the church, the repulsion of respectable people, and his association with bad companions. You just think you can "get up and come to Christ" any time you want to! Wait till you try it! Wait till you decide "tonight is the night. I'm going to walk the aisle and kneel and accept Christ." Just wait till that night comes, and then watch Satan call up before your memory every rotten thing you did that you will have to confess, every sinful allurement you will have to give up, every friendship you will have to break, and everything your buddies will call you when they see you with the people you had called "hypocrites."

[You just mess around another year or another day, old buddy, and see what happens when you "return"! You may return to a ]{.class_s321}[church ]{.class_s322}[or a ]{.class_s321}[sacrament]{.class_s322}[ or a family altar or a family, but returning to ]{.class_s321}["THE MOST HIGH" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 16) is "something else."]{.class_s321}

And now it's "Hee Haw" time on the "Grand Ole Opry" and time to trace the "scientific achievements" of the "historico grammatico" method of the "Bible exegetes" as they improve on your Bible from the "oldest and best manuscripts" using the "scientific approach of intrinsic probability" to etc., etc.

[1. Somebody's "anger smoulders all night" in the ]{.class_s321}[NASV]{.class_s322}[, at verse 6, and the king ]{.class_s321}[wasn't drunk ]{.class_s322}[in verse 5, the ]{.class_s321}[princes ]{.class_s322}[were. No one "made ready his heart" (vs. 6), it just turned out that way ]{.class_s321}[accidentally ]{.class_s322}[(]{.class_s321}[NASV]{.class_s322}[), since their hearts are ]{.class_s321}["like an oven" ]{.class_s323}[(vs. 6). Israel ]{.class_s321}[doesn't ]{.class_s322}[return to anyone---including the devil---they simply "turn," and the Most High (who wrote the books) has been quietly kicked out of verse 16 by the Lockman Foundation while Bob Jones University continues to promote the "version." \[When you find radical fanatics like that who would run God out of His own book, you've gotten out as far into left field as you can get without joining the Ecumenical Council. See ]{.class_s321}[Satan's []{#cJW.xhtml_page_101}Masterpiece, The NASV, ]{.class_s322}[1973.\]]{.class_s321}

CHAPTER EIGHT

8:1 Set the trumpet to thy mouth. He shall come as an eagle against the house of the LORD, because they have transgressed my covenant, and trespassed against my law.

2 Israel shall cry unto me, My God, we know thee.

3 Israel hath cast off the thing that is good: the enemy shall pursue him.

4 They have set up kings, but not by me: they have made princes, and I knew it not: of their silver and their gold have they made them idols, that they may be cut off.

[Hosea is well underway. Since Nebuchadnezzar, the pillager of Jerusalem, is an ]{.class_s321}["EAGLE"]{.class_s323}[ (Ezek. 17:1--10) and an outstanding type of the Antichrist, so the Assyrian (Isa. 10:5--12) has to be an ]{.class_s321}["EAGLE"]{.class_s323}[ (Hosea 8:1) since he and Nebuchadnezzar are both connected (Jer. 50:17) with Satan. [It comes, ]{.class_s321}[like the eagle, ]{.class_s322}[out of the clear blue sky.]{.class_s321}

[There is no indication that the word ]{.class_s321}["nesher" means ]{.class_s322}["VULTURE" in one verse in either Testament in English, Coptic, Greek, Syriac, or Hebrew.
